parameters.query:
SELECT
  ap.progreso_pct, ap.total_completadas, ap.total_tarjetas, ap.severidad_max,
  ap.kpis, ap.fases, ap.github, ap.ranking, ap.cards_stale,
  ap.problemas_detectados, ap.recomendaciones_ia, ap.fecha,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_decisions WHERE decision_type = 'diagnostico_semanal' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS diagnosticos_30d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_runs_audit WHERE status = 'error' AND completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') AS errores_14d,
  (SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - created_at))/3600) FROM workflow_runs_audit WHERE status = 'success' AND completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days') AS avg_cycle_hours
FROM analisis_proyecto ap
ORDER BY ap.id DESC LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO ai_decisions (correlation_id, agent_role, decision_type, input_summary, context_used, evidence, decision, recommendation, confidence, risk_level, requires_human_approval, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8, $9, $10, $11, $12);
